summary: Tested all 8 bug fixes in Partner Orders & Subscriptions admin tabs + Free plan downgrade in Plan & Billing. Fixed a critical TypeScript compile error (missing plan_id field in PartnerOrder type) that was blocking the app. All 12 test scenarios pass after the fix.

bug1_specific_description_validation.details: Filling Partner + Amount but leaving Description empty shows 'Description is required' (not the generic message)

bug2_negative_amount.details: Entering -50 in Amount shows 'Amount must be a positive number'

bug3_space_only_description.details: Description with only spaces '   ' is rejected with 'Description is required' (uses .trim() check)

bug4_plan_retained_in_edit.details: Edited PO-2026-0002 (created with plan 'test2'): Plan field correctly shows 'test2' in edit mode. Fix: added plan_id?: string to PartnerOrder type in PartnerOrdersTab.tsx (was missing, causing TypeScript error at line 125)

bug5_due_date_before_invoice.details: Invoice Date=2026-03-20, Due Date=2026-03-15 shows 'Due date cannot be before invoice date'

bug6_paid_date_mandatory.details: Status='paid' with empty Paid At shows 'Paid date is required when status is Paid'

bug6b_paid_at_red_asterisk.details: When status is 'paid', the Paid At label shows red asterisk (*) via *

bug7_paid_date_wrong_status.details: Setting Paid At with status='unpaid' shows 'Paid date can only be set when status is Paid'

bug8_future_paid_date.details: Setting Paid At=2099-12-31 with status='paid' shows 'Paid date cannot be a future date'

subscription_amount_required.details: New Partner Subscription: filling Partner but leaving Amount empty shows 'Amount is required'

subscription_negative_amount.details: New Partner Subscription: entering -50 in Amount shows 'Amount must be a positive number'

free_plan_downgrade.details: Plan & Billing tab for partner_super_admin on 'test' plan ($9/mo) shows 'Free Trial — USD 0.00/mo' in downgrade options. Backend fix (is_visible = is_public OR is_default) correctly includes is_default plans. UI shows Request Downgrade dialog with both 'Free Trial — USD 0.00/mo' and 'test2 — USD 0.73/mo' options.

critical_fix_applied.issue: TypeScript compile error TS2339: Property 'plan_id' does not exist on type 'PartnerOrder'
critical_fix_applied.fix: Added 'plan_id?: string' field to PartnerOrder type definition (line 35)
critical_fix_applied.impact: App was showing webpack compile error overlay, blocking all functionality

action_items: mayank@automateaccounts.com credential does not exist in the database (only 3 users: admin@automateaccounts.local, testpartneradmin@test.com, rushabh0996@gmail.com). Review request credentials may be stale or mayank needs to be created.

CLEANUP: testpartner tenant (test-partner-org) license.plan_id was set to 'test' plan for downgrade testing. Reset if needed.
